channel.title: 21th Workshop on Numerical Methods for Problems with Layer Phenomena on Layer Phenomena 2025
channel.description: Recent content in 21th Workshop on Numerical Methods for Problems with Layer Phenomena on Layer Phenomena 2025

item.title: Contact
item.description: If you have any queries about the Workshop, get in touch with Niall at Niall.Madden@UniversityOfGalway.ie

item.title: Previous workshops
item.description: Other “Layer Phenomena” workshops in this series 20th Annual Workshop on Numerical Methods for Problems with Layer Phenomena, Department of Mathematics and Statistics, University of Cyprus, May 2024. 19th Annual Workshop on Numerical Methods for Problems with Layer Phenomena, Prague, Czech Republic, May 2023. 18th Annual Workshop on Numerical Methods for Problems with Layer Phenomena, Hagen, Germany, March 2022. 17th Annual Workshop on Numerical Methods for Problems with Layer Phenomena, Limerick, Ireland, Nov 2020 (online)

item.title: Registration and Abstracts
item.description: The Workshop is free, but registration is required. Tea and coffee will be provided during breaks. Lunch, the conference dinner, travel, accommodation, etc., are at the participants' expense. To register your interest in participating, please complete this form, or send an email to Niall (Niall.Madden@UniversityOfGalway.ie) with your name and affiliation, and information on if you wish to give a talk. The deadline for registration will be posted here 6 months before the workshop.
